title: Blood Sigil
description:

Adds optimized red aura particles to your character’s feet and back, fully toggleable with commands to ensure zero performance impact.

😈 Stylish / Aura Vibe

Adds a powerful crimson aura with smooth particles on your feet and bac
body:
🔴 Blood Sigil – Crimson Aura Particles

Blood Sigil is a lightweight cosmetic mod that adds crimson aura particles around your character’s feet and back, creating a dark, powerful sigil-like visual effect. The mod is purely visual and does not alter gameplay mechanics, player stats, or provide any competitive advantage.

Performance and stability are the core focus of Blood Sigil. The particle system is carefully optimized to ensure smooth gameplay with no noticeable FPS drops, even on low-end systems. For full player control, the aura can be toggled on or off at any time using simple in-game commands, allowing you to enable the effect only when you want it.

Blood Sigil requires no complex configuration or menus and works instantly after installation. This makes it suitable for survival, PvP, creative gameplay, recording, and general use where strong visual style is desired without sacrificing performance.

🛠️ Commands

/aurag on – Enables the aura particles

/aurag off – Disables the aura particles

Blood Sigil is perfect for players who want a dark, stylish aura effect with full control, clean visuals, and zero performance impact.
